creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Radim Kolar from comment #2)

Thank you! 

Please:

- Update the port to include yourself as MAINTAINER
- Update the attachment in this issue with one in the form of a shell archive (shar) or unified diff (svn diff or diff -u). diff (patch) is preferred.
- Confirm the port passes QA (portlint, poudriere at least [1])

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/testing.html
